hero.title: Victrix, your trusted partner in IT consulting services and solutions
hero.subtitle: Strengthen your cybersecurity and optimize your processes with Victrix. Leverage our leading-edge expertise in IT management, cloud computing, and AI governance to propel your organization forward and stay at the technological forefront of your industry.

iso.title: ISO 27001 Certified
iso.subtitle: Information security at the heart of all our practices.

items.title: Cybersecurity
items.description: Audit, governance, monitoring, identity and access management (IAM), automation — SevOC.

items.title: Cloud Computing
items.description: Multi-cloud roadmap, opportunity assessment (IaaS, PaaS, SaaS), security posture analysis, migration to a cloud platform (AWS, Azure).

items.title: Productivity
items.description: BI and Power BI, Microsoft 365 development, process management and automation.

items.title: Artificial Intelligence
items.description: Opportunity exploration and analysis, development of custom AI agents and solutions, secure adoption of generative AI.

items.title: Managed Services
items.description: Managed security and cloud computing services.

solutions.title: SevOC
solutions.body: The SevOC takes charge of your organization’s security operations. Unlike a traditional SOC, our modular and scalable offering lets you stay at the forefront of security technologies.

experts.title: Meet our experts
experts.subtitle: Don’t hesitate to contact us to discuss your projects.
